data.name: uiBorrarRegistroListados
data.value: Do you want to remove all records?

data.name: uiBorrarRegistroUnico
data.value: Do you want to remove the record?

data.value: Do you want to cancel the modifications?

data.name: uiDatoNoValido
data.value: Invalid Data

data.name: uiDatosGuardar
data.value: Do you want to save data?

data.name: uiDatosNoGuardados
data.value: There are not-saved data

data.name: uiDatosNoValidos
data.value: Error while Validating Data

data.name: uiDatosRestaurados
data.value: Restored Data

data.name: uiDatosSaveIsOk
data.value: Saved Data

data.name: uiDgvRowEmpty
data.value: All rows are empty

data.name: uiDgvRowMultiple
data.value: Just select one record

data.name: uiDgvRowNull
data.value: You must select one record

data.name: uiEjeTrazadoCreado
data.value: The route plan axis already exists

data.name: uiEntidadNotFound
data.value: Entity with IDs {0} \not found in the current file

data.name: uiEntidadNotFoundRecomendacion
data.value: To remove the record linked to the entity is recommended

data.name: uiFileAppSelect
data.value: Select a Project File

data.name: uiFileBbSelect
data.value: Select a Database TADIL

data.name: uiFileDataLoadOk
data.value: File of Data Loaded

data.name: uiFileNotFound
data.value: File {0} not found

data.name: uiFileNotFoundSelectOrigen
data.value: File {0} not found Select a New Path

data.name: uiObraLinealCreado
data.value: The lineal work already exists

data.name: uiPerfilCreado
data.value: The longitudinal profile already exists

data.name: uiProcesoAnulado
data.value: Process cancelled

data.name: uiSalirDatosSinGuardar
data.value: Form closed without saving data

data.name: uiSalirDatosSinModificar
data.value: Data have not been modified

data.name: uiSalirPregunta
data.value: Do you want to close form?

data.name: uiSelectEjeBasico
data.value: Select a Basic Axis

data.name: uiSelectIsNull
data.value: Null Selection

data.name: uiSolucionEnvolventeMaximaNotFound
data.value: There is no solution maximum envelope curve

data.name: uiSolucionenvolventeMinimaNotFound
data.value: There is no solution minimum envelope curve

data.name: uiSolucionPrimariaNotFound
data.value: There is no solution with the parameters of initial design

data.name: uiExportarEntidadesNotFound
data.value: There are no entities to export

data.name: uiObraLinealExportarRealizado
data.value: The lineal work has been already exported

data.name: uiTDBnoPerimiteInstancia
data.value: You cannot open the TDB form You must close the TDI form first

data.name: uiTDInoPermiteInstancia
data.value: You cannot open the TDI form You must close the TDB form first

data.name: uiEjeTrazadoNoExiste
data.value: First you must generate the route plan axis

data.name: uiPerfilLongitudinalCivilNoExiste
data.value: First you must generate the longitudinal profile with Civil 3D

data.name: uiPtoIniPtoFinMuyCercanos
data.value: Distance between starting and final point is lower than 2*A or 2*A

data.name: uiEjePerfilNoExiste
data.value: First you must generate the longitudinal profile

data.name: uiFaltanDatosEjeBasico
data.value: First you must fill in the table "Type Section and General Areas"

data.name: uiPolilineaAbiertaErronea
data.value: An open polyline cannot be linked to a GIS area

data.name: uiFileNotFoundImg
data.value: File {0} is not located in the folder img

data.name: uiNombreConCaracteresEspeciales
data.value: Names cannot include special characters

data.name: uiPolilinieas3dNoValidas
data.value: 3D Polylines cannot be entered to create the MDT

data.name: uiEntidadPolilinea
data.value: The ID of the polyline entity is {0}

data.name: uiFicheroExito
data.value: File succesfully created

data.name: uiSeleccionaPuntosDePolilinea
data.value: \n Select points from the polyline

data.name: uiAnalizandoAbanico
data.value: Analysing the Fan {0} ; Stretch {1} ; Location {2}

data.name: uiBorrarRegistro
data.value: Would you like to remove the Record?

data.name: uiCompletarLasPestAnteriores
data.value: You must fill in previous tabs

data.name: uiListadoSeccionesError
data.value: List Sections with Errors

data.name: uiNoFichSelecionado
data.value: Any file has been selected

data.name: uiNomFichNulo
data.value: The File Name is invalid

data.name: uiSel2Soluciones
data.value: You must select at least 2 solutions\n to start the evaluation process

data.name: uiSelecSolucion
data.value: You must select one solution

data.name: uiSelHipotesis
data.value: You must select one evaluation hypothesis

data.name: uiSelPolilineas
data.value: Select the polyline ensemble to be simplified

data.name: uiSumaPorcentajes
data.value: The addition of percentages is not 100 :\n {0}

data.name: uiTAGNoConfig
data.value: The TAG of field {0} has not been configured

data.name: uiNoTerrenoSeleccionado
data.value: No Cartography has been selected

data.name: uiTramoLlegadaNoCumple
data.value: The destination stretch fails to comply with the design criteria

data.name: uiTramoSalidaNoCumple
data.value: The starting stretch fails to comply with the design criteria

data.name: uiZonaNoPaso
data.value: You want to pass through a banned area

data.name: uiZonaNoPasoConNombre
data.value: The area {0} is tagged as banned area

data.name: uiGuardaTerreno
data.value: You must save the terrain data before creating the surround polyline

data.name: uiNoBBDD
data.value: Data Base is not loaded

data.name: uiSelPolEnvolvente
